'''Lanaxa Tark''' was the [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Boes Tark]] and,<ref name="WBC" /> in [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]],<ref name="WBCdate">[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], which notes [[Moxin Tark]]'s age as thirty, is set three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which the ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. ''Wanted by Cracken'' must therefore be set in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]] and Moxin's [[Reproduction/Legends|birth]] year must be [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]].</ref> they had a [[Reproduction/Legends|son]] named [[Moxin Tark|Moxin]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bandonia]].<ref name="WBC" /> They raised Moxin on the [[Tark family estate]] in a life of luxury until, at age eighteen, he ran away to pursue adventures in [[Realspace/Legends|space]], eventually becoming a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].<ref name="GG10">''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Lanaxa Tark was first mentioned in ''[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|Wanted by Cracken]]'', [[Louis J. Prosperi]]'s [[1993]] sourcebook for [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game|''Star Wars'' Roleplaying Game]] by [[West End Games]].<ref name="WBC" />
